category_selector.description: Horizontal scrollable list of pill-shaped buttons for selecting object types (bars, tubes, etc.).
category_selector.style: Background secondary, text primary. When active, background primary, text white. Crisp edges, radius pill.

camera_view.style: Overlaid controls should have dark semi-transparent backgrounds (surface color with opacity) and backdrop blur if possible.

drawing_canvas.description: Interactive layer over the captured photo for drawing include/exclude regions.
drawing_canvas.style: Default exclude (dark tint over image). Include paths drawn with green stroke (#34C759), Exclude paths with red stroke (#FF3B30). Supports 1-finger draw, 2-finger pan/zoom.

markers.description: Numbered indicators placed over detected objects in the photo.
markers.style: Small circular absolute-positioned views. Background marker_bg, border 1px solid white. Text tiny, bold, centered.

bottom_sheet.description: Draggable or fixed bottom panel for counting results and manual adjustments.
bottom_sheet.style: Surface color, top border radius xl. Contains large counter typography and distinct +/- circular buttons.

buttons.primary: Large, full-width or prominent FAB. Background primary, radius md, text bold white.
buttons.icon_button: Circular, background surface_elevated, icon white. Used for manual add/remove markers.

animations.button_press: Scale down to 0.95 on press in.
animations.camera_capture: Brief full-screen white flash opacity 0 to 1 to 0.
animations.counter_update: Subtle pop (scale 1.1 to 1) when count increases/decreases.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on primary/surface backgrounds meets 4.5:1 minimum contrast.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 44x44 points for all interactive elements (+/- buttons, category pills).

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: 'category-select-bars', 'capture-photo-btn', 'manual-add-marker-btn', 'count-result-text'.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native Expo application. Use React Native Core Components (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, StyleSheet) and Expo libraries (expo-camera, expo-image-manipulator, etc.).

Since Tailwind was mentioned in the environment but this is Expo, use NativeWind if configured, otherwise use standard React Native StyleSheet strictly following the defined colors, spacing, and typography tokens.

For the drawing interaction (include/exclude), implement a custom canvas using React Native Gesture Handler or PanResponder to track touch events and render SVG paths (react-native-svg) over the image.
Ensure the camera takes up the full screen, with UI controls overlaid safely within the SafeAreaView to avoid notches.
Implement the manual marker add/remove feature by allowing users to tap on the image to add a marker, or tap an existing marker to remove it, supplemented by the +/- buttons in the bottom sheet.
Keep the UI 'Performance Pro' style: highly functional, dark mode by default, high contrast, zero clutter. Every element should feel tactile and responsive.
